title: Raw-Friendly Mexican Apricot Veracruz Flan
description: A delicate, glassy-jelly Veracruzan dish featuring apricot and smoky flavors from the robata grill, adapted to be raw-friendly without compromising on flavor.
instructions: Preheat a robata grill to medium-high heat.
Grill the apricots for 2-3 minutes per side, or until slightly charred.
In a blender or food processor, combine the grilled apricots, agave nectar, lime juice, diced green chilies, chopped cilantro, smoked paprika, salt, and cinnamon.
Strain the mixture through a fine-mesh sieve into a bowl, pressing on the solids to extract as much liquid as possible.
Add the water to the bowl and stir to combine.
Pour the mixture into a 6-inch round mold or a 9x5-inch loaf pan.
Refrigerate the flan for at least 4 hours or overnight.
Unmold the flan onto a serving plate and slice into wedges.
